## Problem

What product or documentation problem does this change solve?

## Changes

-

## Design impact

- [ ] Informative clarification only
- [ ] Normative rule or Token change
- [ ] New component or integration
- [ ] Accessibility or interaction change
- [ ] Product-extension change

Describe affected product families, themes, viewports and migration requirements.

## Evidence and references

Link primary sources, product evidence, screenshots or measurements. Label third-party observations clearly.

## Validation

- [ ] `node scripts/validate-docs.mjs`
- [ ] Light and dark implications reviewed
- [ ] Keyboard and screen-reader implications reviewed
- [ ] Mobile and touch implications reviewed
- [ ] Reduced motion/transparency implications reviewed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated when user-visible

## Rollback

How can consuming products revert or defer this change?
